title: 10 best herbal creams for sleep deprivation
description: Melissa officinalis, also known as lemon balm, creams helps with sleep deprivation because of its unique ability to calm the mind and relax the body. The antispasmodic and sedative properties of lemon balm help to soothe the nervous system, reducing anxiety and stress that can disrupt sleep.
